creator: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
text:
> -----Original Message-----
> From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org] 
> Sent: Saturday, February 23, 2008 2:50 PM
> To: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
> Subject: Re: ports/121003: [UPDATE] net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple
> 
> Maintainer of net/p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/121003 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/121003
> 
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 

Hi there,

I do approve this patch, and I would also like to add the following trivial
patch for the pkg-descr file:

--- ../p5-Amazon-SQS-Simple.orig/pkg-descr	Wed Dec 12 08:33:32 2007
+++ pkg-descr	Sat Feb 23 23:42:08 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 This module provides a Perlish interface to Amazon SQS.
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/~swhitaker/Amazon-SQS-Simple-0.5/
+WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Amazon-SQS-Simple/


Thank you,
Greg Larkin
